correctness_detail: cross-engine affine-hull agreement on a 18-qubit, depth-36 random Clifford circuit, 1000 shots/engine. GF(2) affine dim: stim=18, moonlab=18, stacked=18. Equal all three => identical measurement support => identical stabilizer distribution.
name: clifford_tableau_throughput_n20
notes: Both engines drive the identical seeded gate list through their interactive stabilizer tableau (moonlab.clifford.Clifford vs stim.TableauSimulator), one Clifford gate per Python call. Construction and terminal measurement excluded from timing. Stim additionally offers a batched stim.Circuit sampler path not exercised by this per-gate tableau metric.
workload: random Clifford circuit, n=20 qubits, depth=267 layers of per-qubit {H,S} + random disjoint CNOT round, 8010 total gate applications (seeded, shared by both engines); interactive tableau, one gate per call
